title: [PR] fix(config): recover from a healthy backup when the global config is corrupt
summary:
## Summary

A present-but-corrupt `~/.openclaude.json` takes `getConfig` down the `ConfigParseError` path, which either resets to defaults (silently discarding the user's settings) or re-throws — even though healthy timestamped backups exist in `~/.claude/backups`. Previously `getConfig` only consul

title: [PR] fix(provider): add Use Anthropic option to switch back from third-party profiles
summary:
Fixes #1426

## Problem

Once any third-party provider profile is active, `/provider` offers no way back to built-in Anthropic. `getActiveProviderProfile` falls back to `profiles[0]` whenever `activeProviderProfileId` is unset, so clearing the active id still re-selects a saved profile. The only esc

title: MCP Agent
summary:
# 1. MCP 协议概述

## 1.1 MCP 的定义、目标和设计理念

### 什么是 MCP 协议

**Model Context Protocol (MCP)** 是由 Anthropic 设计的开放协议，专门用于连接 AI 助手与外部数据源和工具。MCP 的核心目标是为 AI Agent 提供一个标准化、安全且可扩展的方式来访问外部资源。

### 设计理念

MCP 协议遵循以下核心设计理念：

1. **标准化接口**：定义统一的消息格式和交互模式
1. **安全第一**：内置权限控制和数据隔离机制
1. **可扩展性**：支持自定义资源类型和工具扩展
1. **简单易用**

summary:
## Summary

_Claude Code on behalf of Guillaume Nodet_

Fixes https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CAMEL-23879

Changing which apps a user has installed — via the top-nav app-config dialog, or via the app-access "Add Application?" prompt — did not consistently show up in the Home dashboard's app tiles or the app switch

embeddings for the tool without enabling the general semantic-search engine (we

title: [PR] feat: bring-your-own-gateway (BYOG) — OpenAI-compatible AI provider for self-hosting
summary:
## Summary

Lets the in-dashboard AI assistant run on any **OpenAI-compatible** model provider — NVIDIA NIM, vLLM, Ollama, OpenRouter, LM Studio, or a private gateway — so **self-hosted** deployments can bring their own gateway/key instead of being locked to the Vercel AI Gateway + Anthropic models.
